results.question: How many patients are in the database?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(p.patient_id) AS total_patients
FROM patients p;
results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_patients FROM patients;

results.question: Which doctors work in Cardiology?
results.expected_sql: SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name FROM doctors d JOIN departments dep ON d.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Cardiology' ORDER BY d.last_name, d.first_name;

results.question: How many appointments are in the database?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.appointment_id) AS TotalAppointments
FROM appointments a;
results.expected_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_appointments FROM appointments;

results.question: Which appointments were completed?
results.expected_sql: SELECT appointment_id, appointment_date, reason, diagnosis FROM appointments WHERE status = 'completed' ORDER BY appointment_date DESC, appointment_id DESC;

results.question: Which medications were prescribed?
results.expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT medication_name FROM prescriptions ORDER BY medication_name;

results.question: Which patients received Paracetamol?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT p.first_name, p.last_name
FROM patients p
JOIN prescriptions pr ON p.patient_id = pr.patient_id
WHERE pr.medication_name = 'Paracetamol';
results.expected_sql: SELECT DISTINCT p.first_name, p.last_name FROM patients p JOIN prescriptions pr ON p.patient_id = pr.patient_id WHERE pr.medication_name = 'Paracetamol' ORDER BY p.last_name, p.first_name;

results.question: How many appointments did each doctor have?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.doctor_id, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments
FROM appointments a
INNER JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id
GROUP BY d.doctor_id;
results.expected_sql: SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments FROM doctors d LEFT JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id GROUP BY d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name ORDER BY total_appointments DESC, d.last_name, d.first_name;

results.question: How many appointments took place in each department?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name;
results.expected_sql: SELECT dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments FROM departments dep LEFT JOIN appointments a ON dep.department_id = a.department_id GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name ORDER BY total_appointments DESC, dep.department_name;

results.question: Which doctor had the most appointments?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.doctor_id, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS appointment_count
FROM doctors d
INNER JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id
GROUP BY d.doctor_id
ORDER BY appointment_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments FROM doctors d JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id GROUP BY d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name ORDER BY total_appointments DESC LIMIT 1;

results.question: Which patients have more than one prescription?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.patient_id, COUNT(p.patient_id) as prescription_count
FROM prescriptions AS p
JOIN prescriptions AS p2 ON p.patient_id = p2.patient_id AND p.prescription_id <> p2.prescription_id
GROUP BY p.patient_id
HAVING COUNT(p.patient_id) > 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(pr.prescription_id) AS total_prescriptions FROM patients p JOIN prescriptions pr ON p.patient_id = pr.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_id, p.first_name, p.last_name HAVING COUNT(pr.prescription_id) > 1 ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC, p.last_name, p.first_name;

results.question: Show appointments in Cardiology.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT a.appointment_id, p.patient_id, a.diagnosis, a.reason, a.status
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id
JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id
WHERE dep.department_name = 'Cardiology';
results.expected_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, a.appointment_date, a.reason FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Cardiology' ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, p.last_name, p.first_name;

results.question: Count prescriptions by medication.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT medication_name, COUNT(prescription_id) as prescription_count
FROM prescriptions pr
INNER JOIN appointments a ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id
GROUP BY medication_name;
results.expected_sql: SELECT medication_name, COUNT(*) AS total_prescriptions FROM prescriptions GROUP BY medication_name ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC, medication_name;

results.question: What are the 5 most recent appointments with patient names?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT a.appointment_date, p.first_name AS patient_first_name, p.last_name AS patient_last_name
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id
ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC
LIMIT 5;
results.expected_sql: SELECT a.appointment_date, p.first_name, p.last_name, a.reason FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, a.appointment_id DESC LIMIT 5;

results.question: Show all departments ranked by number of completed appointments.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT dep.department_id, dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) as num_completed_appointments
FROM appointments a
JOIN departments dep ON dep.department_id = a.department_id
JOIN doctors d ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id
WHERE a.status = 'Completed'
GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name
ORDER BY num_completed_appointments DESC;
results.expected_sql: SELECT dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_completed FROM departments dep JOIN appointments a ON dep.department_id = a.department_id WHERE a.status = 'completed' GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name ORDER BY total_completed DESC, dep.department_name;

results.question: Which diagnosis appears most frequently in Emergency?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT diagnosis, COUNT(appointment_id) AS frequency
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
LEFT JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id
WHERE dep.department_name = 'Emergency'
GROUP BY diagnosis
ORDER BY frequency DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT a.diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS total_cases FROM appointments a JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Emergency' GROUP BY a.diagnosis ORDER BY total_cases DESC, a.diagnosis LIMIT 1;

results.question: Show patients who visited more than one department and how many departments they visited.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.patient_id, COUNT(DISTINCT dep.department_id) as departments_visited
FROM patients p
JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
GROUP BY p.patient_id
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT dep.department_id) > 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.department_id) AS total_departments FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_id, p.first_name, p.last_name HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.department_id) > 1 ORDER BY total_departments DESC, p.last_name, p.first_name;

results.question: Which city has the highest number of patients with at least one appointment?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.city, count(distinct a.patient_id) as num_patients
FROM patients p
JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
WHERE p.city IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY p.city
ORDER BY num_patients DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT p.city, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS total_patients FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id GROUP BY p.city ORDER BY total_patients DESC, p.city LIMIT 1;

results.question: Which medications are most prescribed for Neurology appointments?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT pr.medication_name, COUNT(*) as prescription_count
FROM prescriptions pr
INNER JOIN appointments a ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id
INNER JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
WHERE dep.department_name = 'Neurology' AND a.status = 'Completed'
GROUP BY pr.medication_name
ORDER BY prescription_count DESC;
results.expected_sql: SELECT pr.medication_name, COUNT(*) AS total_prescriptions FROM prescriptions pr JOIN appointments a ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Neurology' GROUP BY pr.medication_name ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC, pr.medication_name;

results.question: List the top 5 doctors by number of appointments.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) as num_of_appointments
FROM appointments a
INNER JOIN doctors d ON a.doctor_id = d.doctor_id
GROUP BY d.doctor_id
ORDER BY num_of_appointments DESC
LIMIT 5;
results.expected_sql: SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments FROM doctors d JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id GROUP BY d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name ORDER BY total_appointments DESC, d.last_name, d.first_name LIMIT 5;

results.question: For each department, show total appointments and distinct patients.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS distinct_patients
FROM appointments a
LEFT JOIN departments d ON a.department_id = d.department_id
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id
GROUP BY d.department_name;
results.expected_sql: SELECT dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments, COUNT(DISTINCT a.patient_id) AS total_patients FROM departments dep LEFT JOIN appointments a ON dep.department_id = a.department_id GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name ORDER BY total_appointments DESC, dep.department_name;

results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments
FROM doctors d
JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id
GROUP BY d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name
ORDER BY total_appointments DESC
LIMIT 1;

results.question: Which patients have more than one prescription?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(pr.prescription_id) AS total_prescriptions
FROM patients p
JOIN prescriptions pr ON p.patient_id = pr.patient_id
GROUP BY p.patient_id, p.first_name, p.last_name
HAVING COUNT(pr.prescription_id) > 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, COUNT(pr.prescription_id) AS total_prescriptions FROM patients p JOIN prescriptions pr ON p.patient_id = pr.patient_id GROUP BY p.patient_id, p.first_name, p.last_name HAVING COUNT(pr.prescription_id) > 1 ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC, p.last_name, p.first_name;

results.question: Show appointments in Cardiology.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT a.appointment_id, a.appointment_date, a.patient_id, a.doctor_id, a.reason, a.diagnosis, a.status
FROM appointments a
JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
WHERE dep.department_name = 'Cardiology';
results.expected_sql: SELECT p.first_name, p.last_name, a.appointment_date, a.reason FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Cardiology' ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, p.last_name, p.first_name;

results.question: Count prescriptions by medication.
results.expected_sql: SELECT medication_name, COUNT(*) AS total_prescriptions FROM prescriptions GROUP BY medication_name ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC, medication_name;

results.question: What are the 5 most recent appointments with patient names?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    a.appointment_id,
    p.first_name,
    p.last_name,
    a.appointment_date
FROM appointments a
JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id
ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC
LIMIT 5;
results.expected_sql: SELECT a.appointment_date, p.first_name, p.last_name, a.reason FROM appointments a JOIN patients p ON a.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY a.appointment_date DESC, a.appointment_id DESC LIMIT 5;

results.question: Show all departments ranked by number of completed appointments.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS appointment_count
FROM departments dep
LEFT JOIN appointments a ON dep.department_id = a.department_id AND a.status = 'completed'
GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name
ORDER BY appointment_count DESC;
results.expected_sql: SELECT dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_completed FROM departments dep JOIN appointments a ON dep.department_id = a.department_id WHERE a.status = 'completed' GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name ORDER BY total_completed DESC, dep.department_name;

results.question: Which diagnosis appears most frequently in Emergency?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT a.diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS frequency
FROM appointments a
JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
WHERE dep.department_name = 'Emergency'
GROUP BY a.diagnosis
ORDER BY frequency DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT a.diagnosis, COUNT(*) AS total_cases FROM appointments a JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Emergency' GROUP BY a.diagnosis ORDER BY total_cases DESC, a.diagnosis LIMIT 1;

results.generated_sql:

results.question: Which city has the highest number of patients with at least one appointment?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT p.city, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS patient_count
FROM patients p
JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id
GROUP BY p.city
ORDER BY patient_count DESC
LIMIT 1;
results.expected_sql: SELECT p.city, COUNT(DISTINCT p.patient_id) AS total_patients FROM patients p JOIN appointments a ON p.patient_id = a.patient_id GROUP BY p.city ORDER BY total_patients DESC, p.city LIMIT 1;

results.question: Which medications are most prescribed for Neurology appointments?
results.generated_sql:
SELECT pr.medication_name, COUNT(*) as prescription_count
FROM appointments a
JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id
JOIN prescriptions pr ON a.appointment_id = pr.appointment_id
WHERE dep.department_name = 'Neurology'
GROUP BY pr.medication_name
ORDER BY prescription_count DESC;
results.expected_sql: SELECT pr.medication_name, COUNT(*) AS total_prescriptions FROM prescriptions pr JOIN appointments a ON pr.appointment_id = a.appointment_id JOIN departments dep ON a.department_id = dep.department_id WHERE dep.department_name = 'Neurology' GROUP BY pr.medication_name ORDER BY total_prescriptions DESC, pr.medication_name;

results.question: List the top 5 doctors by number of appointments.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments
FROM doctors d
LEFT JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id
GROUP BY d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name
ORDER BY total_appointments DESC
LIMIT 5;
results.expected_sql: SELECT d.first_name, d.last_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments FROM doctors d JOIN appointments a ON d.doctor_id = a.doctor_id GROUP BY d.doctor_id, d.first_name, d.last_name ORDER BY total_appointments DESC, d.last_name, d.first_name LIMIT 5;

results.question: For each department, show total appointments and distinct patients.
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    dep.department_name,
    COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments,
    COUNT(DISTINCT a.patient_id) AS distinct_patients
FROM departments dep
LEFT JOIN appointments a ON dep.department_id = a.department_id
GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name;
results.expected_sql: SELECT dep.department_name, COUNT(a.appointment_id) AS total_appointments, COUNT(DISTINCT a.patient_id) AS total_patients FROM departments dep LEFT JOIN appointments a ON dep.department_id = a.department_id GROUP BY dep.department_id, dep.department_name ORDER BY total_appointments DESC, dep.department_name;
